Detailed Description

Device Functionality - DeviceEEPROM Read/Write
System ID: 0x21

+--------------------+------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Register Name      | Id   | Comment                                                                                 |
+====================+======+=========================================================================================+
| lock               | 0x00 | write the key to unlock, anything else to lock.Key value: 0x3edeb7aa (float 0.434995)   |
+--------------------+------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
